item.description: About Me Hello, I am George Bourlakis, cybersecurity researcher and enthusiast. I live in Athens, Greece and I was born in 13/02/1998. Education Diploma, Integrated Master of Science - MSci, Computer Engineering and Informatics Department, University of Patras. My diploma thesis "Artificial Intelligence algorithms to detect malware in TLS traffic" can be found in Nemertes or in Github. Certifications CompTIA PenTest + HackTheBox Profile Visit my HackTheBox profile HTB geobour98.
Projects My Projects can be found in GitHub page: GitHub geobour98.
